spam.subject: URGENT: IT Support Ticket - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Rohan,

We have detected unusual activity on your corporate account. To ensure the security of your data and to comply with our IT policies, we need you to verify your credentials.

Ticket ID: IT-2026-04-15-001

Please click the link below to reset your password and confirm your identity:
<URL>

Note: If you do not complete this verification within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended.

For any assistance, reply to this email or call the helpdesk at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
IT Support Team
XYZ Corporation
